<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Runner\Extension; use PHPUnit\TextUI\Configuration\Configuration; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface Extension { public function bootstrap(Configuration $configuration, Facade $facade, ParameterCollection $parameters): void; }
